headline: TechnipFMC Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Miss, Both Rise Y/Y
summary: FTI expects Subsea segment revenues of $9.2-$9.6 billion and Surface Technologies revenues of $1.15-$1.3 billion in 2026.

headline: Why Flowco's Valiant Acquisition Matters for Future Growth
summary: FLOC's $200M Valiant deal adds ESPs to its lift lineup, expanding Permian reach and enabling end-to-end support as wells mature.
